programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Michelle and David from Liverpool search for a holiday home on Spain's Costa del Sol with a budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Paul and Debbie from Staffordshire want a holiday home on the island of Fuerteventura, so Ben Hillman lines up five properties near the coastal town of Caleta de Fuste

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig and his daughter Holly are pooling their resources to buy a property in their favourite holiday destination - Majorca. They love the beach and the great outdoors and want to be as close to the coast as possible. With a budget of £180,000, Danni Menzies sets out to find their ideal property

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Florida to help the owners of Fleming, a Danish restaurant in Miami. A husband-and-wife duo bought the business eight years ago in the hope of continuing the place's success, but started losing money rapidly. With a Cuban chef cooking Nordic cuisine and a filthy kitchen, things go from bad to worse until it all comes to a head on relaunch night

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of Anthony Trobiano, whose restaurant in Great Neck, New York, is failing even though his partner's parents have given him their life savings and he has taken out half a million dollars in loans. Gordon has some harsh criticism about the unhygienic kitchen and the quality of the food being served, but the owner has trouble accepting his advice

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Daters include 31-year-old Adam, who believes his voice - which has been compared to David Beckham's - puts off potential girlfriends. Eighty-year-old glamorous great-grandma Lynda has been single for three years and is looking for someone to share a good time with, while 27-year-old salon manager Stephanie worries that her excessive sweating could be a turn-off

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: Twenty-four-year-old York carer Bonnie has spent most of her life living with her parents and looking after her sister. Away from home, she's a music-loving singer who performs with a rock band in her spare time and yearns for some excitement in the 'love department'. Here, aerospace engineering student Ruben, vegan yoga teacher Eden, wedding singer Charlie, personal trainer Ben and financial administrator Ray compete for her attentions. After a while it becomes clear that Bonnie faces a dilemma - does she go for the guy she thinks is the best-looking, or the one who she's most in tune with emotionally?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Companion show to baking contest, featuring unseen footage from the programme and an interview with the week's eliminated baker. Jo Brand welcomes presenter AJ Odudu and Extra Slice favourite Richard Osman to discuss the new bubble of bakers and get stuck into Cake Week. Plus, comedian and regular contributor Tom Allen invites an array of home-bakers to bravely present him with their delights

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The edition focuses on the rapidly growing number of 999 calls connected to the over-75s. In Warminster, the emergency services are called to a crash involving three cars, which has left one person with life-changing injuries and was caused by a 75-year-old man who suffered a suspected heart attack at the wheel. PC Phil Bridge is searching Trowbridge to find a 73-year-old woman who is in the latter stages of dementia and has disappeared while out shopping with her son

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Sergeant David 'Podders' Podmore is called out to investigate after a shooting in the Liverpool area, and following a raid at a property, a number of weapons are seized, including a potential improvised explosive device made out of industrial fireworks. Meanwhile, Sam Jones and Matt Coogan head to the scene of a mortar bomb discovery, while Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called to Llandudno, where a magnet fisherman has taken a mortar that he's found to work

programme.title: Brain Surgeons: Between Life and Death
programme.desc: Documentary following patients undergoing life-changing brain surgery at the Neurological Centre in Southampton - one of Britain's foremost neurosurgical units, where some of the most difficult and complex operations in the country are performed. Twelve-year-old Matthew faces a gruelling two-day operation to remove an extremely rare tumour deep in his mid-brain, next to his pineal gland. This is a region key to the functioning of sight, muscles, hearing and sensation. With access to the hospital's team of leading paediatric surgeons, the programme follows the doctors' attempts at a delicate and risky operation, which could save Matthew's life

programme.title: Bone Detectives: Britain's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Tori Herridge and a team of scientists piece together the story behind the discovery of 13 bodies with the skulls cut open in a 19th-century Bristol graveyard. The investigation uncovers a link to a local hospital, a celebrated surgeon, and the crime of bodysnatching

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: A look at the people who work on Scotland's railways and steam enthusiasts who safeguard these iconic routes. They include train conductor Suzie Sangan, whose social media posts celebrate one of the world's most beautiful railway lines. Cameras also focus on engineers abseiling beneath the Forth Bridge to carry out essential checks on one of the world's most famous UNESCO Heritage sites. And there's a trip to Blair Castle for the pipes and pageantry of the Atholl Highland Gathering

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: NHS manager Helen Mather holds the first party in Leicester, hoping her plans for a simple menu will allow her more time to entertain her guests. However, the accident-prone host has a mishap involving raw pig's blood, and tries to turn the evening around with some 'urban ballet' after one diner sours the mood with a display of less-than-polite table manners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Estate agent Terry Robinson hosts the second dinner party in Leicester with a 'Dress as Your Hero' theme, and the Elton John fan also decides to treat his guests to a song. He is confident his menu will score him top marks, but while Richard is blown away, Ryan remains unimpressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beauty spa manager Porchia Lee hosts the third dinner party in Leicester, serving up a French-themed menu of chicken liver pate, pan-fried chicken with tarragon sauce and creme brulee. Unfortunately for her the pudding is so bad her guests are reduced to tears, and double glazing salesman Richard Deeping insults her appearance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT enthusiast Ryan Bruce hosts the fourth dinner party in Leicester, and tries to impress his guests with a Spanish-inspired menu cooked in front of them. Entertainment is provided by Ryan's sister, West End actress Charlie Bruce, who puts the contestants through their paces in a salsa lesson

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Double-glazing salesman Richard Deeping hosts the final dinner party in Leicester, and hopes to make up for his boisterous behaviour by impressing the guests with his culinary prowess. In a bid to land higher scores, he puts on his own brand of entertainment, only to reveal a little too much of himself in the process, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Michelle and David from Liverpool search for a holiday home on Spain's Costa del Sol with a budget of £60,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Young-at-heart couple Natalie and Andy Ray love Florida for its fun-filled attractions and weather, and are looking for a future family holiday home there. Ben Hillman tempts them with five homes within easy reach of the theme parks, all within their budget of £280,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Kennels owner Dean Faulkner is keen to impress as he hosts the first dinner party in Cambridge, where his guests are beauty school co-ordinator Kay Greenwood, gardening enthusiast Matt Sullivan, headstrong international development manager Hawa Sydique and the Beatles-obsessed Dave Goodier

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to East Sussex in their hunt to discover valuable items 'lost' in people's homes, with their finds including some Victorian street lamps

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra comes down with a bad case of flu and takes to her bed, forcing Ray to look after her and the kids. Unfortunately for him, a meeting with a star quarterback complicates matters. Guest starring Terry Bradshaw

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes envious of Robert's good looks and decides the time has come to get a head-to-toe makeover, complete with fake tan. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jack's Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chef's advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig and his daughter Holly are pooling their resources to buy a property in their favourite holiday destination - Majorca. They love the beach and the great outdoors and want to be as close to the coast as possible. With a budget of £180,000, Danni Menzies sets out to find their ideal property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin goes house hunting in and around the Spanish town of Chiclana de la Frontera on the Costa de la Luz with Steve and Janice

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: A special programme celebrating the show's 20th anniversary, as Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer look back over two decades of house-hunting together. In this episode, the pair reminisce about some of their previous house-hunting missions where lifestyle needed to be balanced with business. Champion dog trainer Lauren needed land for her collies, while parents Carole and Alan wanted adjoining buildings to set up a holiday rental business.

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: The presenter heads to one of Britain's grandest 17th-century powerhouses - the decadent Ham House - and learns about the remarkable matriarchs who put it on the map, before exploring the Thames-side formal gardens that surround it. Plus, George has a private tour at the modernist Hampstead home of one of his heroes - architect Erno Goldfinger, the man thought to have inspired James Bond's nemesis

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Shows under review are Get Organized with The Home Edit, Ratched, EastEnders, The Andrew Marr Show with Keir Starmer, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, The Great British Bake Off, The Third Day and Politics Live with the PM's address to the House of Commons

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Members of the Army's EOD and Search Regiment head to the Isle of Man, where police believe they have found a bomb-making factory in a garage, while Sgt David Podmore investigates when the coastguard reports a possible torpedo on a Wirral beach

programme.title: Trump: An American Dream
programme.desc: Documentary charting Donald Trump's extraordinary journey through five decades as businessman, developer, media star and politician before reaching the White House. The series also considers how the president's rise reflects the story of modern America - one of capitalism, celebrity, reality TV and social media

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: Housing officer Charmain helps pensioner Mr Holland, a former shipbuilder whose flat is in a state of disrepair and is unable to do the work himself after taking a tumble. Meanwhile, ex-council tenant Max's estate is also undergoing major renovations. But having bought his flat through right-to-buy scheme and paid off his mortgage, the council now has to bill him an enormous £121,000 for his share of the essential, multi-million-pound works. In the pest department, Andy and Wayne tackle a derelict shop over-run with rats

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Matt Lucas takes over from Sandi Toksvig as host for the 2020 series, alongside returning presenter Noel Fielding and regular judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. The 12 contestants for this series have been required to form a social bubble due to Covid-19 lockdown restrictions. The contest begins with Cake Week, beginning with a signature challenge to produce a classic Battenberg. For the technical round, Paul sets the contestants the task of making a fruit sponge, and the final Showstopper Challenge gives the bakers a chance to express their creativity

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates a new way to use sustainable white fish, rustling up fishcakes poached in milk and chives to create a vibrant green sauce. The chef and his son Buddy take a simple ice-cream and dress it up to create a dessert the kids will love to get their hands on, while Jamie creates his take on a peri-peri chicken

programme.desc: Alan encounters financial problems when he starts paying for all his girlfriend's bills, and gets into trouble with Judith for not paying his alimony cheque on time. Comedy, starring Jon Cryer and Charlie Sheen

programme.desc: Jake's teacher calls a meeting with Alan and Judith to discuss the youngster's lack of interest at school, and Alan falls for Francine - upon realising his relationship with girlfriend Kandi is missing something. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.desc: A girl from Jake's school invites him to his first boy-girl party. Alan and Charlie try to help him prepare for it by offering advice, but become nostalgic about their own first parties. Comedy, starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie hooks up with Chelsea's best friend, which causes problems when his ex suggests a reconciliation, and Alan has an unexpected effect on a new female patient

programme.desc: Alan plans an intimate night at a hotel with his partner, while Charlie tries a different approach to get the 'girlfriend experience'

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jake discovers that Alan has been secretly dating Eldridge's mother Lindsey, and is so furious he decides to move out and live with Judith full time. Meanwhile, Charlie resolves to drop his booze habit

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan struggles to decide whether to move in with Lyndsey, having become comfortable staying at Charlie's place. However, when he discovers that Judith is not so keen on the idea of his living so close, he gleefully takes the plunge - just to provoke his ex-wife's temper

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In this special episode, the High Court enforcement agents have to deal with a fraudulent tenant, an evasive debtor and a mother in denial. Steve and Ben are in west London to see a tenant who owes £14,000 in unpaid rent, but when they gain access to the property they discover the house has divided up like a hotel and is being sublet. In Sussex, Brian and Del chase a debt of over £10,000 owed to a van rental business for damaged vehicles, before heading to Kent to try to reclaim £6,000 of unpaid rent from a woman financially dependent on a new partner after a disastrous divorce

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In north London, agents Del and Dael chase nearly £2,000 owed by a printing company, but the owner denies the debt and starts getting physical. Meanwhile, Stewart and Elmor find themselves caught up in a personal dispute when they try to collect rent arrears from a barber's shop, and in Bedfordshire, Del and Brian try to recover almost £2,000 owed to a funeral director. Stewart and Vic track down a debt of £5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Craig investigate a possible case of mistaken identity in Shropshire, then in south Wales find themselves embroiled in a bitter dispute between two dog owners over a vet's bill. Steve and Phil have to evict a distraught young family from a former high street bank in west London, before paying a call on an elderly tailor in north London

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul has a tenant in Lancashire who is behind with his rent and won't return any calls, but the situation is much worse than he could possibly have imagined when he heads into the upstairs bedroom. Harrow enforcement officers Andrew and Ozge are called to a local salon, where a leak from the upstairs flat is disrupting Masi's ability to run her shop. Once the landlord agrees to give them access, they discover terrible conditions and a back yard piled with rubbish

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Following a tip-off, Harrow Enforcement officers are shocked to discover an industrial-scale cannabis farm in a house. The team, along with the police, are determined to find out who has been running this illegal operation. After complaints of all-night parties in a quiet street in Darwen, Lancashire, letting agent Paul pays the revellers a visit. The house is in terrible shape, but the young tenants promise they will clear it all up and keep the noise down. Instead, however, the partying gets worse, with some of the tenants' 'associates' making nasty threats

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul is called to a houseshare after fighting, cannabis use and partying drive one resident out of the property establishes the source of the problem is a young couple. Harrow housing agents Andrew and Jo find a suspected unlicensed multiple-occupancy house in gross disrepair. After tracking down the landlord, they have mercy and allow him to spend his £5,000 fine on fixing up the property, in the hope he will turn it into a nice family home. But will the he be as good as his word?

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The housing team in Harrow accompany the police on a raid after receiving reports of dangerous conditions at a home belonging to a notorious slumlord's brother. Lettings agent John wants to turn a former Blackpool hotel into bedsits, but a routine check on the property reveals not only a severely neglected house, but also a drugs den littered with paraphernalia and some of the worst conditions he has ever witnessed

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Bridget's focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her baby's father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips

programme.title: Access

Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips

programme.title: Britain's Council House Millionaires
programme.desc: Documentary about some of the nation's wealthiest buy-to-let landlords, who have made a fortune by buying up former council homes, and renting them out to those in need. Among those featured is a Manchester property magnate who buys properties in the city's less desirable areas and rents them to students at up to £400 a month for a room, a London estate agent who only deals in former council properties, and a Kent man who grew up in a council house, and recognises the quality of the construction

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen seeks spiritual guidance in a bid to allay her guilt over her recent engagement. Will and Grace expand their venture into property development, but clash with a ruthless couple known as the Real Estate Champions. Chloe Sevigny, Edie Falco and John Edward guest star

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen reveals she cannot drive, and persuades a reluctant Will to give her a lesson, but a police officer pulls them over for speeding. Meanwhile, Jack invites Grace to the cinema - only to see Stuart with another man. Eric McCormack and Megan Mullally star

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will takes Grace's advice and plays hard-to-get with his new boyfriend, but soon finds this does not seem to be helping matters. Meanwhile, Jack and Karen are distraught to learn their favourite TV show is being axed. Bebe Neuwirth and Sharon Osbourne guest star

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part two of two. After catching Junior and his girlfriend Vanessa getting up to no good, Michael and Jay throw him out of the house, and he ends up living in a tent in the back garden until everything has calmed down

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Part one of two. As the day of Junior's graduation approaches, he shocks the family by announcing he wants to go to college. Michael decides to help him make a good impression at the induction - but resorts to offering the interviewer a bribe

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A family who have generated more than 600 complaints from angry neighbours move into a quiet suburban street in Blackburn. Plus, a psychiatrist in south London battles a huge renovation next door, while thumping basslines, pounding walls and slamming doors deprive a mother and her family of sleep

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Featuring two quarrelling neighbours who record each other's every moment on CCTV and in diaries. Their dispute began when Thomas parked his caravan on a quiet cul-de-sac, much to the annoyance of his neighbour Mrs Potter. Plus, how a shared driveway pushed Susie to breaking point when her neighbour Grant put her young daughter at risk. Susie decided to install gates across the drive and use it for family barbecues, but Grant took matters into his own hands and it ended in a trip to the police station for him

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Officers chase £4,500 in court fees in north Wales after a property deal turned sour, and in Birmingham the agents try to collect over £3,500 from a single mum who defaulted on loan repayments. Elsewhere in Worcestershire, the enforcement agents try to recover more than £10,000 from a shop-keeper for fraudulently keeping a deposit during a property sale

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Staffordshire agents try to collect nearly £2,500 in unpaid parking fines, while officers Matt and Garry head to the West Midlands to recover £4,500 owed from a debtor to his former girlfriend. Agents travel to south-east London looking to collect £3,000 owed by a taxi company

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south-east London, officers Gary and Cona chase a debt of nearly £50,000 in unpaid rent, leading to a feisty confrontation with the debtor. Agents Gary and Paul try to recover over £2,000 owed by a teenager to a local garage in Kent, and officers Max and Paul head to south-west London on the trail of a film producer who owes £8,000 to financial advisers

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In Coventry, the sheriffs chase £10,000 owed by a publican to a contractor. The property appears to be empty, but after finding an ingenious method of entry, Matt and Garry are confronted by a surprised and angry landlord. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to central London to try to recover almost £8,000 owed by a former peer of the realm to a firm of accountants

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit. Officers pursue an off-road motorbike, which results in the riders trying to escape over a garden fence. Elsewhere, Garry and Stef catch one of Leeds' most prolific burglars, and officers find suspicious-looking paraphernalia in another driver's vehicle

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Police officers race through the streets of Leeds on an extraordinary pursuit. Elsewhere in Huddersfield, Duncan and dog Tia join forces with the firearms unit, combining their expertise to bring two wanted men to justice. Later, Adie and Chris spend an evening lost in a forest after hunting down a wanted vehicle

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Australian soap opera, charting the lives and loves of the residents of the suburb of Erinsborough

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Australian soap opera charting the latest comings and goings of the residents of Summer Bay

programme.title: Inside Iceland: Britain's Budget Supermarket
programme.desc: The secret world of Iceland's food development, sourcing, manufacturing and distribution, through exclusive access to the outlets and suppliers. In Thornton Cleveleys, just north of Blackpool, bargain-hunting customers are queuing overnight to be first in line to get some cheap food and the chance to win vouchers to spend at the opening of a brand new store

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: New Saydo Park arrivals Carole and Phyllis already love life in Spain but they want to experience more of the community spirit, so they sign up for fellow resident Margaret's mystery tour. Where will it take them? Tree surgeon Rocky faces danger on a daily basis as he tends to the high branches of the Costa del Sol, while young magician Dean faces the first night of a residency at the Chamber of Secrets theatre

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. They begin with Lincolnshire single mum, Sam, who has dedicated her life to caring for her disabled daughter, leaving no time for cleaning

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary following travellers' constant struggle to co-exist with settled communities. Carol and her family cannot understand why her community is so hated and vilified, while local man Arthur is on a mission to understand what brings the travellers into parks and public areas - and Carol's caravan is his first stop. Johnny and his family live in a chalet in Essex but his non-traveller wife Andrea has had enough of feeling ostracised and wants to move back into a normal house

programme.title: My Mother the Monster
programme.desc: Adults Daniel, Christopher and Katrina relive the horrors of sharing their world with abusive mothers, including the story of one parent who was convicted of 26 charges of abuse. Thirty-year-old Christopher was taken into care from the age of three and went to live with respected foster mother and Jehovah's Witness Eunice in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire. Christopher arrived in what appeared to be a loving home in the middle of the countryside, but this idyll was short-lived and Christopher endured beatings and starvation for more than a decade. When Eunice's abuse was finally uncovered, she was sentenced to 14 years in prison

programme.title: Sarah Payne: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: Examining the murder of Sarah Payne, an eight-year-old girl who was killed by Roy Whiting in 2000, and the mistakes he made that led to him being arrested and locked up for life. The programme features interviews with detectives, forensic experts and other crucial witnesses, charting the police investigation and the evidence that led them to her killer

programme.title: Babies 24/7: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: Midwife Jenna is away from the hospital on her community rounds visiting first time mum Steph who is overdue and more than ready to meet her baby

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. Mum-of-three Geraldine is overwhelmed by a sea of clutter in her three-bedroom house

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Cabot Cove's new priest takes a murderer's confession, and asks Jessica to help him uncover the truth without breaking his sacred oath of absolute confidentiality. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The death of an elderly writer prompts Jessica to recall an intriguing mystery that happened aboard the Queen Mary some 50 years previously. Guest starring Robert Vaughn, with Angela Lansbury and June Havoc

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Palm Springs to check on an investment and finds herself drawn into solving the murder of a property developer. She initially believes the dead man's wife is guilty of the crime, but the suspect's subsequent suicide complicates matters further. Elliott Gould guest stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher recounts the unusual tale of a private eye who reluctantly recruited a new partner in the form of a French poodle, which once belonged to a murder victim. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A volunteer firefighter is found dead in a burnt-out furniture store. However, Jessica's suspicions are aroused when the post-mortem suggests he was deceased before the blaze started. Angela Lansbury stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits the opera and finds that, amid the hysteria and emotion of the singing world, a murder has taken place that appears at first to be a case of self-defence. A world-famous tenor faces a battle to clear his name. Angela Lansbury and Keith Michell star

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself in the middle of a wealthy family squabbling over the inheritance of a multi-millionaire, and spends the weekend at his isolated island retreat. As the arguments show no signs of abating, her host begins to fear for his life. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica meets an old friend who happens to be one of the best homicide detectives in Los Angeles, and helps provide the vital clue in the case that ended his career. Starring Angela Lansbury and Barry Newman

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman disrupts Cabot Cove's mayoral election campaign by claiming one of the candidates is her secret husband and the father of her five children. Jessica steps in to investigate when she is found dead. Ruth Roman guest stars

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Three people claim the body of an unidentified man who is discovered dead on a railway line in an attempt to cash in on the will. Whodunit, guest starring Bryan Cranston, with Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An unscrupulous landlord is killed, and suspicion falls on an impoverished factory worker whose life he made hell. However, Jessica is not convinced of the woman's guilt and sets out to unmask the real killer. Guest starring Lorna Luft, alongside Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates a murder in the world of high finance when her stockbrocker is killed. Her list of suspects appears to be endless, including the secretary who seems to have been doing all of the broker's work. Starring Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler are drawn into a series of psychological games by Merritt Rook (guest star Robin Williams), an engineer whose obsessive hatred of authority proves popular with the public and wins him a cult following. Hard-hitting drama, with Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a pregnant woman is found in a burnt-out building, triggering an investigation that leads the team to suspect a wealthy coffee trader and his son may be responsible. The case eventually goes to court, but a mistrial is declared - to the dismay of Novak, who vows to fight on regardless

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the attempted murder of a woman found beaten into a coma, and their only witness is her daughter, who has severe learning difficulties. The spotlight soon turns on the victim's husband, who claims to have found his wife on his return home from a business trip - but the airline passenger list reveals he was not on the flight. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A student counsellor is murdered in New York, and Benson and Stabler investigate a possible connection to her volunteer work at a refugee centre. They discover she had been helping a taxi driver who claimed to have been tortured after the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001. The trail soon leads the detectives to suspect the involvement of a doctor with links to a company that benefitted financially from the Iraq war

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, leading Mac and his former partner William Hunt to become embroiled in a 17-year-old vendetta. Crime drama, guest starring Peter Fonda

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A near-fatal experience prompts Mac to consider ending his career, but before he makes a decision he returns to his last unsolved case so he can be at peace with his ultimate choice. He reinvestigates a robbery that ended in a double murder in 2002, and tries to find the girl who disappeared after witnessing the crime. Drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Columbo: Old Fashioned Murder (1976)
programme.desc: A woman who has devoted her life to running her family's museum is outraged when her brother decides to sell it. Knowing of someone with criminal connections, she arranges to have her brother killed. However, just when she starts to think she has got away with it, a certain shabby sleuth is assigned to the case. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Joyce Van Patten, Celeste Holm and Tim O'Connor

programme.title: Columbo: A Stitch in Crime (1973)
programme.desc: Surgeon Barry Mayfield decides he needs get rid of his colleague to speed along a research project. When his partner requires heart surgery, Mayfield performs the operation himself and discreetly arranges some fatal complications. However, when he also murders a nurse who suspects the truth, he attracts the attention of the slovenly sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Leonard Nimoy and Will Geer

programme.title: Columbo: Murder Under Glass (1978)
programme.desc: The crumpled detective applies his well-honed instincts to a case of blackmail and murder in the world of haute cuisine when a restaurant owner is found dead after throwing a renowned food critic off his premises. Crime drama from The Silence of the Lambs director Jonathan Demme, starring Peter Falk, Louis Jourdan, Shera Danese and Richard Dysart

programme.title: Columbo: The Bye-Bye Sky-High IQ Murder Case (1977)
programme.desc: An accountant who has a reputation as being one of the brightest men in the world realises he has to kill a fellow genius to cover up his illegal activities. He puts his remarkable intelligence to the task of covering up every possible clue that could lead back to him - but has not counted on the equally sharp mind of slovenly sleuth Columbo. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and Theodore Bikel

programme.title: Columbo: Any Old Port in a Storm (1973)
programme.desc: A vineyard owner's financial security is jeopardised when his playboy younger brother threatens to sell the family winery. He resorts to killing his sibling and rigging the death scene to look like a scuba-diving accident. However, the crumpled cop sees through the ruse and in the process reveals he is something of a wine buff himself. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Donald Pleasence and Julie Harris

programme.title: Columbo: Ashes to Ashes (1998)
programme.desc: The shabby sleuth investigates the complex case of a murdered Hollywood gossip writer. He uses his unique talents to interrogate a smooth-talking funeral director, who was once romantically involved with the victim and one of the last people to see her alive. Detective drama, with Peter Falk. Patrick McGoohan co-stars and directs

programme.title: Columbo Goes to College (1991)
programme.desc: Two criminology students murder their professor and cover their tracks with false clues. They think they are on the way to outwitting everyone - but find themselves at the bottom of the class when Columbo intervenes. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Stephen Caffrey, Gary Hershberger and Robert Culp

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when a legal clerk is found murdered in a judge's house. The judge, Dutch Blakemore, admits he was having an affair with the victim, and it soon emerges he was plagiarising her work. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Chester Lake is suspected of murdering a police officer, and Fin's investigation into his history reveals he has been working with a freelance team solving cold cases. Details emerge that Lake has kidnapped the friend of a 14-year-old girl who was raped and murdered - but the focus turns to the dead cop as more evidence is uncovered. Drama, starring Adam Beach, Ice-T and Christopher Meloni

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A college student is murdered in an attack bearing all the hallmarks of a notorious serial killer. Stabler and the team believe it is the work of a copycat and their investigation leads them to a group of loyal followers, including a man who glorifies the crimes in his comic books

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and the team become embroiled in the hard-hitting world of ultimate fighting when a teenager's body is found with her lips cut off. DNA traces lead to a cage fighter with a dubious record, while footage from the victim's mobile phone offers a link to two members of a university fraternity house. Starring Christopher Meloni

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Lindsay receives a combat cross medal for bravery, and new recruit Jo Danville stumbles over a body in the crime lab on her first day in the role. The detectives discover the victim worked in one of the building's other offices, and Adam finds evidence suggesting death was premeditated. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder on a video chat website, and the team races to the victim's apartment, where a search reveals a significant clue - her laptop has gone missing. Inquiries eventually lead to a college professor who implicates the dead girl's boyfriend - and as the case unfolds, it emerges that the killer is lining up a second victim. Crime drama, starring AJ Buckley, Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple are attacked in their home, and while the male victim is found dead at the scene, Mac is able to question the severely injured wife, who identifies her own son as the assailant. However, a convicted drug dealer confesses to the crime, forcing the team to investigate his motives. Guest starring Marcos De la Cruz (Sons of Anarchy)

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: Undercover detective John Campbell is shot dead while investigating an illegal international trade in stolen luxury car parts. Laura and the team quickly make an arrest, only to find a photograph of Campbell in the suspected killer's possession that could only have been obtained from an apparently secure police computer. It transpires that other police files have also been hacked and circulated to the wider world, so the team sets out to find the hacker responsible. Debra Messing stars

programme.title: The Mysteries of Laura
programme.desc: When the body of a young man found in a church is linked to the annual New Gotham Treasure Hunt, Laura and the team enter the game in the hope of catching the killer

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: New York's district attorneys investigate the mysterious death of a stockbroker who was dating the daughter of a ruthless cosmetics mogul - and find themselves caught up in a wrangle over whether HRT withdrawal can be used as a defence in law. Police drama, guest starring Lucie Arnaz, with Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A novelist's apparent suicide becomes a murder case, with the evidence leading Lupo and his new partner Kevin Bernard to suspect a secretive religious group. Award-winning police drama, starring Jeremy Sisto and Anthony Anderson

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A legal-aid strike leads first to murder, and then to Rubirosa pitting her wits against Cutter as the ADA tries to bring a case against a pro golfer accused of the killing of a paralegal. American legal drama, starring Alana De La Garza and Linus Roache

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A tennis star is attacked in her locker room before a big tournament, and her wrist is broken during the incident. The sportswoman cannot give a description of her assailant, but the circumstances of the fray lead the detectives to suspect one of her competitors. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a woman dies in a hospital emergency room, Briscoe and Logan investigate a doctor's unorthodox method of treating cancer, which McCoy intends to prove is negligent homicide. Sam Waterston joins the cast

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Abby becomes the target of an assassination attempt while working in the lab - and the team's search for her would-be killer leads to the main suspect in an embezzlement trial at which she is appearing as a witness. However, subsequent developments also place her ex-boyfriend in the frame. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Michael Weatherly star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A suspect dies while being restrained by Ziva, who finds herself accused of using undue force and becomes the subject of an internal investigation. To make matters worse, Jenny is kidnapped by the dead man's brother, who demands a consignment of impounded heroin in exchange for her release. Drama, guest starring Connor Trinneer (Enterprise) and Tamara Taylor (Bones), with Mark Harmon, Cote de Pablo and Lauren Holly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: While Gibbs attends the memorial service for a friend who was lost at sea, he discovers that the deceased man, Navy Captain Phillip Brooks, had been hiding in a fallout shelter after his boat was attacked and swam to shore. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sean Murray star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part two of three. The investigation into the warring prostitution rings threatens to tear the SVU team apart, but the squad is determined to uncover the truth. Cragen also stands accused of murder. Return of the crime drama, starring Dann Florek and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Part three of three. Cragen wakes up alongside a dead escort, who had been a potential witness. The squad tries to bring the case to a close as the detectives reach breaking point. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU puts out a media appeal for information on a youngster found on the streets of New York covered in someone else's blood. The child's alleged father turns up to collect him, but tests reveal he is not biologically related - a development that makes Stabler doubt whether Kathy's unborn child is really his. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of a 14-year-old immigrant girl, and initially suspect the involvement of a thug with a history of violence - but the case is complicated by the discovery that the victim was married to a 35-year-old polygamist

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The head of a notorious Puerto Rican gang is found dead outside a hotel shortly after his predecessor is released from jail. Mac is forced to use his diplomatic skills to prevent a revenge attack - but a second death and an ambush on a police car lead him to believe the killer is a disgruntled insider. Drama, starring Gary Sinise, with Edward James Olmos (Battlestar Galactica, Blade Runner)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Armed robbers break into the apartment of lawyer Roland Carson and make off in a helicopter with jewels worth more than $5million. The detectives investigate and, as people who have come into contact with the gems start to turn up dead, they suspect Carson could have staged the whole affair and killed his accomplices to cover his tracks. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. In this edition, he introduces footage of reckless acts behind the wheel by criminals and other drivers exhibiting a complete disregard for the safety of others

programme.desc: Jenni Falconer searches for a new home in Crete for a Buckinghamshire couple with £150,000 to spend. Judy and David are dedicated followers of T'ai Chi and recently got engaged in a medieval ceremony. David is a trained pilot and keen to progress that interest when he and Judy move to a warmer environment

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore properties about to be auctioned, then follow the sale and talk to the buyers about their plans for the buildings. This episode features a derelict house in Surrey where the new owners plan to build four houses, a novice developer in Crewe, and a couple of seasoned property professionals in Cheshire

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a cottage in Cornwall, a property in Cumbria and a home in County Londonderry, Northern Ireland. They then find out what they were sold for at auction and speak to the new owners about their plans

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a bungalow, a terraced house and a unique water tower about to be auctioned in Gosforth in Newcastle, Maidstone in Kent and Northern Ireland's Newtownards. programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Vicky paints a portrait of Celine as a gift for her birthday

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara wants her pet caterpillar to perform in a special circus

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The excitable zebra encourages everyone to share their belongings, but the scheme does not go as planned

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra organises a game of coconut scoop, and the prize is a delicious fruit

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra suggests arranging a Present Day on the island, but struggles when he is asked to find a gift for Vicky

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The zebra realises that the island needs tidying up and organises a scavenger hunt to make everyone participate

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby takes over Ylvi's treehouse and will not let her in. Vic comes up with a plan to scare him away, but it goes badly wrong

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The king wants to demolish the village and build a palace on the site, leaving the vikings homeless

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Ylva competes against Baltak's wife in a baking contest - and they are both send their husbands on a quest to find a very rare ingredient

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar and Vic go in search of a magic sword, unaware that an evil warlord plans to steal it from them once they have it

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar challenges Sven to a fight, confident his invincible sword will guarantee him victory. However, Vic fears his father may be in over his head

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings put on a play inspired by a story about the Norse gods Odin, Thor and Loki for a festival

programme.title: Filthy Cities
programme.desc: Dan Snow embarks on a grime-filled journey through the histories of three of the world's leading modern cities. He begins with London, using CGI footage and re-enactments to experience life in the capital in the 14th century. He spends a night as a medieval muck-raker, and tries on a pair of wooden platform shoes designed to elevate the wearer above the filth that covered the streets

programme.title: Haunters of the Deep (1984)
programme.desc: An American businessman tries to reopen a Cornish tin mine, but the ghosts that haunt the tunnels have other ideas. Supernatural drama, starring Andrew Keir and Barbara Ewing

programme.title: The Face at the Window (1939)
programme.desc: In 1880, Paris is terrorised by a hideous murderer. An innocent man is accused of being the killer by a respected aristocrat who longs to get him out of the way so he can seduce his fiancee - but may also have other reasons for wanting a scapegoat. Horror, starring Tod Slaughter and John Warwick

programme.title: Mother Lode (1982)
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of a crazy old Scottish miner who has lived in isolation for many decades. Action adventure, directed by and starring Charlton Heston, with Kim Basinger and Nick Mancuso

programme.title: Trio (1950)
programme.desc: Adaptation of three short stories by W Somerset Maugham, The Verger, Mr Know-Al, and The Sanatorium. Starring James Hayter, Anne Crawford and Jean Simmons

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the stories behind official royal residences, which act as family homes and places to conduct the business of monarchy, and charts the evolution of their architecture. She begins with Buckingham Palace and learns about its links to London sewers, its features including state rooms and a home for camels and elephants, plus how its chandeliers are cleaned

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The consultants explain how changes in diet could help a 19-year-old dancer deal with Crohn's disease and boost the fertility of a man desperate to become a father. They also help a teenager redefine her relationship with food following gastric bypass surgery. Pixie McKenna examines the effectiveness of energy drinks, and a nationwide survey contributes to research into a natural remedy for insomnia

programme.title: The UK Gold (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about London vicar Father William Taylor as he campaigns and speak out against tax dodgers, and investigates the financial secrecy behind tax havens. Narrated by Dominic West

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring Forest Hill, Hither Green and Cubitt Town. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: One Night in Powder (2015)
programme.desc: A clueless music promoter hits the streets of East London, hoping to put together the greatest club night the capital has ever seen, and recruiting the most eccentric residents of Dalston to help him. Documentary-style comedy, starring Jason Attar

programme.title: Common
programme.desc: One-off drama from Jimmy McGovern, exploring the possible consequences of the UK's Joint Enterprise law, by which more than one person can be charged with the same offence. Seventeen-year-old Johnjo gives his cousin Tony and some friends a lift to a pizza parlour for food, unaware their real intention is to 'sort out' a local loudmouth. Things soon get out of hand, however, and an innocent bystander is fatally stabbed - and despite being in the car all the time, Johnjo finds himself charged with murder along with everyone else. Nico Mirallegro heads a cast that also includes Susan Lynch, Daniel Mays, Jodhi May, Robert Pugh and Michelle Fairley

programme.title: True Blue Confessions
programme.desc: A tribute to Mary Millington, Britain's number one sex symbol of the 1970s

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen seeks a boyfriend for her socially inept elder sister Laura, so invites nervous horticulturalist Mike to a party. The pair discover they share a dislike of being fixed up, so depart together to prevent Helen objecting to them leaving. Bob Larbey's comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Helen and Phil are keen to know how things went between unlikely lovebirds Laura and Mike, so both end up invited to lunch - where they relate conflicting stories. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the stories behind official royal residences, which act as family homes and places to conduct the business of monarchy, and charts the evolution of their architecture. She begins with Buckingham Palace and learns about its links to London sewers, its features including state rooms and a home for camels and elephants, plus how its chandeliers are cleaned

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks from Banavie to Gairlocky and around the Ribblehead Viaduct

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the stories behind official royal residences, which act as family homes and places to conduct the business of monarchy, and charts the evolution of their architecture. She begins with Buckingham Palace and learns about its links to London sewers, its features including state rooms and a home for camels and elephants, plus how its chandeliers are cleaned

programme.title: Tightrope to Terror (1983)
programme.desc: Four children on a camping holiday in Italy are involved in a dangerous cable car accident that leaves them dangling 150 feet above a glacier. Children's adventure, starring Richard Owens and Mark Jefferis

programme.title: 4D Special Agents (1981)
programme.desc: Five London children are secretly a crimefighting organisation, and help the police bring a gang of thieves to justice. Children's adventure, starring Lisa East and Dexter Fletcher

programme.title: High Treason (1951)
programme.desc: Officers of MI5 and Special branch join forces to deal with a wave of sabotage attacks that have been sweeping the nation. Spy thriller, starring Liam Redmond and Andre Morell

programme.title: Too Many Crooks (1959)
programme.desc: Bungling crooks kidnap a millionaire's wife, but he is glad to be rid of her and refuses to pay the ransom - so she gets her own back by helping them steal all his cash instead. Comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, George Cole, Sid James, Brenda De Banzie and Bernard Bresslaw

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the coast at Boscastle and visits Ramsey on the Isle of Man

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: As the destruction caused by Hitler's V1s in London and the south of England reached critical proportions, a new fighter was introduced to challenge the enemy's flying bombs. Wing Commander 'Bee' Beaumont remembers his first encounters with the Tempest, and the Wilkinson family from Croydon share their account of life on the ground with help from their day-to-day diary

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: How southerners reacted to the threat of Hitler's V1 flying bombs, which killed 452 people in a week at one point in the campaign. Notoriously inaccurate, the doodlebugs often fell short of their target and hit villages along the south coast from Kent to Dorset, prompting thousands in Chiselhurst to start living in caves

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass the enemy, recalling how, as Hitler prepared to invade, the secret army went underground along the south and East Anglian coasts

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the women who were recruited to join the British Resistance movement and helped deceive Hitler into thinking the D-Day Allied invasion of France would come across the Straits of Dover

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: A trooper is punished during the Queen's Life Guards' rigorous 4pm daily inspection, a ritual that began after a poor turn-out for Queen Victoria. The armoured regiment heads for Farnham and manages to get a tank lost in the town's one-way system, while the trainee horsemen start a kitty during their training - paying £5 every time they fall off

programme.title: Blitz Spirit (2019)
programme.desc: Short film set during the London Blitz, in which a pianist struggles to justify his war efforts to his stubborn mother

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Fords on Water (1983)
programme.desc: Two unemployed young men living in London find themselves with little hope for the future. They refuse to be resigned to their fate, so one night they steal a car and drive north, seeking something better from their lives. Comedy, starring Elvis Payne and Mark Wingett

programme.title: Gloves Off (2017)
programme.desc: A fighter attempts to save his beloved gym by training a gentle giant for a bare-knuckle fight. Comedy drama, starring Brad Moore, Greg Orvis and Ricky Tomlinson

programme.title: Red Army Hooligans (2018)
programme.desc: The leader of a hooligan gang sustains a head injury in a fight with a Russian rival, that could bring an end to his life of violence. However, when both factions find themselves banned from the world cup, he challenges the Russians to come to London and face him and his followers in a series of street battles. Crime thriller, starring Jon-Paul Gates and Earl Ling

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot is sacked for dangling a customer by the ankles, while Gary, on the other hand, is offered a new post. However, he has difficulty breaking the news to George and Anthea. Laddish comedy, starring Harry Enfield and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: As the destruction caused by Hitler's V1s in London and the south of England reached critical proportions, a new fighter was introduced to challenge the enemy's flying bombs. Wing Commander 'Bee' Beaumont remembers his first encounters with the Tempest, and the Wilkinson family from Croydon share their account of life on the ground with help from their day-to-day diary

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: How southerners reacted to the threat of Hitler's V1 flying bombs, which killed 452 people in a week at one point in the campaign. Notoriously inaccurate, the doodlebugs often fell short of their target and hit villages along the south coast from Kent to Dorset, prompting thousands in Chiselhurst to start living in caves

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Mike and Laura agree to go on a date, but chaos ensues in the restaurant when Laura loses a contact lens. Starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams

programme.title: A Fine Romance
programme.desc: Laura buys a new dress for a special dinner with Ben. However, when her date reveals he is married, Mike happens by to pick up the pieces with his usual charm. Comedy, starring Judi Dench and Michael Williams as middle-aged romantics

programme.desc: A mob of berzerkers attack Flake and a rival village, and Vic tries to persuade the people of both communities to work together against their common foe

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Part one of two. A tornado sweeps up the Drakkar and takes it to China - where a general arrests the Vikings, demanding to know how they made their ship fly

programme.title: Vic the Viking

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings visit a village that is supposedly being terrorised by a monster - and Vic meets a like-minded youngster who is determined to prove that the creature is not real

programme.title: Coach Trip

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: The story of the havoc caused by the V1 doodlebugs and the V2 rockets, and of the thousands of deaths that undermined the morale of a war-weary civilian population

programme.title: Doodlebug Summer
programme.desc: Hitler's V1 flying bombs were responsible for the deaths of nearly 6,000 people in London and the South of England. This episode features accounts from the men and women whose job was to fight the V1s from the ground and a report on the impact of a bomb that hit a chapel one Sunday morning, killing 121 people

programme.title: Mother Lode (1982)
programme.desc: A couple of adventurers go into the wilds of British Columbia in search of a lost colleague, but when their plane crashes they find themselves at the mercy of a crazy old Scottish miner who has lived in isolation for many decades. Action adventure, directed by and starring Charlton Heston, with Kim Basinger and Nick Mancuso

programme.title: The Face at the Window (1939)
programme.desc: In 1880, Paris is terrorised by a hideous murderer. An innocent man is accused of being the killer by a respected aristocrat who longs to get him out of the way so he can seduce his fiancee - but may also have other reasons for wanting a scapegoat. Horror, starring Tod Slaughter and John Warwick

programme.desc: Alec fixes up a lunch meeting to discuss Zoe's divorce. Comedy, starring Anton Rodgers

programme.desc: The armoured divisions visit Canada for a mock battle, in which conditions are exactly as expected during a war - except lasers are used instead of live ammunition. programme.title: One Night in Powder (2015)
programme.desc: A clueless music promoter hits the streets of East London, hoping to put together the greatest club night the capital has ever seen, and recruiting the most eccentric residents of Dalston to help him. Documentary-style comedy, starring Jason Attar

programme.title: Mob Handed (2016)
programme.desc: A journalist is outraged to receive no help from the police when her daughter is murdered, and resolves to take the law into her own hands. programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.desc: Manchester United v Tottenham Hotspur. Action from the showpiece encounter at Wembley Stadium, where the first major trophy of the season was contested. programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Liverpool v Cardiff City. Action from the showpiece match at Wembley Stadium, where the winner of the first major trophy of the 2011/12 season was decided. The Reds had defeated the likes of Stoke City, Chelsea and Manchester City to reach the final and went into the match as clear favourites in their first visit to the national stadium since it was rebuilt. However, the Bluebirds, who defeated Crystal Palace on penalties in the semi-finals, had been in good form in the Championship and will have fancied their chances of producing an upset

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Swansea City. Highlights from Wembley Stadium in 2013, where the League Two Bantams were aiming to produce yet another cup upset. Swansea were appearing in their first major cup final and beat Chelsea in the semi-finals to reach this stage, but Bradford had stolen most of the headlines in the competition this season, belying their lowly league status to eliminate the likes of Arsenal, Aston Villa and Wigan Athletic

programme.title: EFL Cup Highlights
programme.desc: Manchester City v Sunderland. Highlights of the showpiece occasion at Wembley Stadium, where the first major domestic silverware of the 2013/14 season was decided. City started as clear favourites as they continued their quest for trophies, but the Black Cats could take heart from their impressive recent record against their big-spending opponents, albeit in home matches, and the fact that they had already eliminated Chelsea and Manchester United from this season's competition

programme.title: Ryder Cup Memories
programme.desc: Luke Donald shares his memories of the remarkable 2012 Ryder Cup in Medinah, where the European team made a staggering comeback to win on the final day. The Americans went into the final day with a 10-6 lead, needing just 4.5 points from the 12 singles matches to win, but the Europeans won eight and tied one of the 12 singles matches to claim a famous 14.5-13.5 victory
